mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO essay_evaluation_dimension (evaluation_id, dimension_key, dimension_label_snapshot, sort_order, score, grade, strength, weakness, suggestion, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.evaluationId}, #{item.dimensionKey}, #{item.dimensionLabelSnapshot}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.score}, #{item.grade}, #{item.strength}, #{item.weakness}, #{item.suggestion}, NOW())
